title: Database connection timeout on prod-db01
description: Production database prod-db01 is down causing a full production outage. All downstream services affected. TCP connections timing out on port 5432.

title: Suspicious login attempts from unknown IP
description: Multiple unauthorized login attempts from unknown IP 185.220.101.7. Brute-force pattern detected — over 500 attempts in 10 minutes. Account lockout triggered. Timeout on auth service.

title: Checkout service returning NullPointerException
description: The checkout microservice throws NullPointerException on every request. HTTP-500 on /api/checkout. Stack trace: at com.shop.CheckoutService.process line 142. Error code CHK-500. Timeout on response. Service failing.

title: Network switch offline in DC rack B
description: Core network switch SW-RACK-B at 192.168.10.1 is completely down. VLAN 20 and VLAN 30 are unreachable. TCP/UDP traffic halted. All rack B hosts offline. Full outage in production zone.

title: Ransomware signature detected on workstation
description: Ransomware malware detected on WS-FINANCE-04 at 10.5.0.44. Attempting to encrypt files on the production shared drive. Machine isolated from network. Breach of data integrity imminent.

title: Payment gateway timeout — Stripe API 503
description: Payment gateway returning HTTP-503 from Stripe. Timeout after 30 seconds on POST /v1/charges. All payment transactions failing in production. Error code PAY-503. Service unavailable.

title: Intermittent packet loss on VLAN 30
description: Users on VLAN 30 subnet 192.168.30.0/24 reporting intermittent packet loss. Approximately 15% packet drop measured via ICMP ping. Network is slow and degraded during peak hours. UDP traffic most affected.

title: Phishing email reported by 3 employees
description: Three employees received phishing email impersonating IT department. Contains malicious link to spoofed login page. Threat type: phishing. Email gateway warning issued. Intermittent spread detected.

title: API response slow — P95 latency 4.2s
description: Product search API /api/search showing slow response times. P95 latency at 4.2 seconds against 500ms SLA. Service degraded under load. Intermittent timeouts observed on endpoint.

title: Scheduled job failed — non-production env
description: Nightly data-sync scheduled job failed in staging. Job ID DATA-SYNC-NIGHTLY. Error code EXIT-1. Failed to connect to staging database. The job is failing consistently. Non-production only, no customer impact.

title: Minor firewall rule misconfiguration found
description: Routine audit found misconfiguration in firewall ACL FW-RULE-047. Permits TCP port 8080 from non-authorised subnet. Low risk — no active exploitation. Remediation scheduled for maintenance window.

title: DNS resolution intermittent on 10.2.0.0/16
description: Users on 10.2.0.0/16 subnet reporting intermittent DNS resolution failures. UDP port 53 queries dropped at resolver 10.2.0.1. ICMP echo succeeds. Approximately 1 in 20 queries fails. Timeout on DNS responses.
